name: Social Media Agent
description: Collects content from Twitter / X, Reddit, and GitHub, then generates a summarized Markdown report with source details.
prompts:
Use `OpenClaw` as the keyword. Automatically gather the most popular and most valuable related content from Twitter / X, Reddit, and GitHub, then generate a summarized Markdown report, save it as `social-media-search-result.md` in the current directory, and send me the full Markdown.

Workflow:
- Use the `xreach-cli` npm tool to collect popular Twitter / X posts and discussion threads related to the keyword: https://www.npmjs.com/package/xreach-cli
- Use the `reddit` skill to collect popular Reddit discussions related to the keyword
- Search GitHub for basic information about repositories associated with the keyword, if any exist

Output requirements:
- Organize the report by source: Twitter / X, Reddit, and GitHub
- For each item, include the original content whenever possible; if it exceeds 200 characters, provide a concise summary instead
- Include the author, publish time, and original link for each item

以 `OpenClaw` 作为关键词，自动从 Twitter / X、Reddit 和 GitHub 收集最热门、最有价值的相关内容，并生成一份汇总后的 Markdown 报告，保存为当前目录下的 `social-media-search-result.md`，最后将完整 Markdown 发送给我。

工作流程：
- 使用 `xreach-cli` npm 工具收集与关键词相关的热门 Twitter / X 帖子和讨论串：https://www.npmjs.com/package/xreach-cli
- 使用 `reddit` skill 收集与关键词相关的热门 Reddit 讨论
- 在 GitHub 中检索关键词关联仓库的基本信息（如果存在的话）

输出要求：
- 按信息源组织内容：Twitter / X、Reddit、GitHub
- 每条信息尽量包含原始内容；如果超过 200 字，则提取简洁摘要
- 每条信息都包含作者、发布时间和原始链接

skills.name: reddit
skills.description: Search and retrieve content from Reddit. Get posts, comments, subreddit info, and user profiles via the public JSON API. Use when user mentions Reddit, a subreddit, or r/ links.
